title: RevDeck feature iteration backlog
objective: Capture the next functional iterations for RevDeck after competitor review, prioritizing shell-first triage, richer evidence, TUI pivots, and report automation.

include: Diff, trace, firmware, crash, protocol, plugin, and report Lab improvements
Automation-friendly JSON output and regression coverage
exclude: Full decompiler parity with Ghidra/IDA/Binary Ninja
Binary patch editing or patch application

tasks.title: CLI object search
tasks.summary: Implemented revdeck search with --kind, --limit, --json, text table output, README docs, and command integration coverage.

tasks.title: CLI object inspect
tasks.summary: Implemented revdeck inspect with ObjectRef parsing, metadata rendering, bounded relation summaries, JSON output, README docs, and command integration coverage.

tasks.title: CLI xrefs and relation traversal
tasks.summary: Add revdeck xrefs for source/sink traversal with direction, edge-kind, depth, and JSON output.

tasks.title: CLI sections and binary map detail
tasks.summary: Expose section tables, file offsets, virtual addresses, entropy, permissions, and format summary from CLI.

tasks.title: CLI import and string summaries
tasks.summary: Add grouped imports/strings commands for Notepad-style quick triage and automation.

tasks.title: API and import family classification
tasks.summary: Classify imports into process, filesystem, registry, network, crypto, memory, dynamic loading, UI, and libc families.

tasks.title: String signal classifier
tasks.summary: Classify strings as URLs, file paths, registry keys, commands, credentials, format strings, UI text, debug strings, or low-value noise.

tasks.title: Function evidence packet
tasks.summary: Build a compact per-function evidence packet combining imports, strings, xrefs, CFG availability, score reasons, and notes.

tasks.title: Instruction and basic block CLI preview
tasks.summary: Implemented revdeck disasm with bounded basic-block/instruction preview, JSON output, and quick-profile unavailable handling.

tasks.title: Signature and known-library baseline
tasks.summary: Added known-library baseline scoring metadata for common runtime/compiler boilerplate without suppressing dangerous evidence.

tasks.title: TUI command deck expansion
tasks.summary: Expanded TUI Help and Command Deck with implemented shell-equivalent search, inspect, xrefs, disasm, import/string, and graph workflow examples.

tasks.title: Graph Lab filters and path finding
tasks.summary: Added TUI Graph Lab filter state, keyboard cycling for relation filters, active-filter rendering, and path/filter coverage.

tasks.title: Diff Lab triage improvements
tasks.summary: Implemented Diff Lab risk summary, per-row risk reasons/refs in JSON, and persisted risk metadata.

tasks.title: Trace and crash correlation depth
tasks.summary: Added trace/crash correlation quality metadata, confidence summaries, uncorrelated counts, and status JSON details.

tasks.title: Protocol and firmware evidence pivots
tasks.summary: Added protocol field pivots, firmware nested artifact summaries, and richer status JSON pivots.

tasks.title: Plugin SDK command scaffolding
tasks.summary: Added plugin scaffold command/API with overwrite protection, generated manifest/ObjectBatch, docs, and validation tests.

tasks.title: Report templates and release gates
tasks.summary: Added report templates, CI gate summary, min lab coverage gate, and export tests.

tasks.title: Project metadata and case notes
tasks.summary: Added project metadata/notes migration, repository, CLI commands, and export context integration.

tasks.title: Workspace packaging and reproducibility
tasks.summary: Added bundle export manifest with schema version, artifact identity, report/database artifacts, and CLI test.

tasks.title: Regression suite for Windows PE samples
tasks.summary: Added runtime synthetic PE command regression coverage, fixture manifest strategy, and Notepad workflow docs.

notes: TASK-001 through TASK-020 are implemented in the working tree.
TASK-006/TASK-007 use derived classification without DB schema changes.
TASK-013 through TASK-020 add workflow depth, automation, project metadata, bundle export, and PE regression coverage.
Priority is based on immediate usefulness for analyzing Windows binaries such as notepad.exe while preserving RevDeck terminal-native evidence workflow.
